arts.ttl: Preview: Hull City vs. Luton Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Hull City and Luton Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Hull City receive timely injury boost before monster Luton Town clash
arts.sum: That's why when you have periods like this international break, you need to be sure that you have a good balance between giving some time off but also keeping the team in a very competitive way. We did that refreshment in the first part of the international break, the first week with a couple of good training sessions and then some time off.

arts.ttl: Hull City player praise fans but bemoans not signing for Manchester City
arts.sum: Hull City attacker Abdülkadir Ömür has told the Turkish media that he still thinks about his opportunity to sign for Manchester City. The Premier League champions were looking to sign the Turkey international earlier in his career, but Trabzonspor, his club at the time, wouldn’t sanction the transfer. arts.ttl: Luton Town labelled the EFL's 'biggest disappointment' by ex-Wolves and Sunderland forward
arts.sum: Don Goodman has his say with the Hatters struggling against relegation

arts.ttl: Hull City loan ace highlights key Ruben Selles trait that is vital to Tigers survival bid
arts.sum: While it's a worrying period given City's sticky position at the bottom end of the table, Gelhardt remains confident that the players can add to their recent good form which has seen them beaten just once in the past seven games. Key to his form, Gelhardt believes, has been manager Ruben Selles, who has made a positive impact in the 19 league games he's overseen since arriving in December, hailing his man-management skills.
